sentences.text: The neighbors thought it was strange that the rich Miller never gave Hans anything.
The Miller had many sacks of flour, cows, and sheep, but Hans did not care.
Hans loved to listen to the Miller's talks about friendship.
Hans worked in his garden and was happy in spring, summer, and autumn.
